segments: Real Estate, Energy and Natural Resources

dependencies: Third-party service providers for logging and transportation services
Availability of contract loggers and haulers
Fuel, labor and insurance costs for service providers
Transportation infrastructure (roads, bridges, rail, tunnels, shipping and port facilities)
risks: Shortage of third-party logging and hauling service providers in certain markets
Increased logging and hauling costs due to limited contractor availability
Labor shortages including commercial truck drivers
Failure of third-party transportation providers to timely deliver products
Increased operating costs for service providers (fuel, labor, insurance)
Natural disasters affecting transportation and supply chain

regulatory_risks: Federal, state and local environmental laws protecting water quality, wetlands and wildlife habitat
Forest practice laws limiting clearcut sizes and requiring reforestation
Regulations on construction and maintenance of forest roads
Pesticide and herbicide use regulations
Endangered Species Act (ESA) protections for threatened and endangered species
Critical habitat designations for ESA-listed species
Canadian Species at Risk Act (SARA) requirements
Woodland caribou recovery strategy and range plans in Canada
Forest certification standards (SFI, FSC, PEFC)
Clean Air Act regulations including MACT standards and GHG emissions rules
EPA regulations on air emissions from wood products facilities and industrial boilers
Biomass emissions regulations
Climate change legislation and GHG emissions regulations
Carbon tax and GHG emission reduction programs in Canadian provinces
Clean Water Act regulations on discharge of pollutants
Total maximum daily load (TMDL) requirements
Canadian Federal Fisheries Act changes
CERCLA Superfund site remediation requirements
Hazardous waste management and disposal regulations
Asset retirement obligations including reforestation and landfill closure
Building codes and product regulations
Indigenous rights and treaty obligations in Canada
Changes in tax laws including mortgage interest and real estate tax deductions
Trade policy including tariffs and duties on imports/exports
Canadian softwood lumber export taxes and US countervailing/antidumping duties

sanction_risks: US-Canada softwood lumber trade disputes and tariffs
Potential tariffs on exports to China and other countries
Retaliatory trade policies from foreign jurisdictions
Changes in US foreign trade policy affecting exports
International trade disputes impacting log and wood product exports
